name: continue-building-caution
note: S-CONTINUE-CAUTION (operator UAT 2026-07-17: the 'Continue building' guard toast 'disappeared before I could read it ... seems like an error'). Tapping Continue building on a saved song WHILE a DIFFERENT draft is already in the Compose buffer must refuse with an AMBER CAUTION toast (not a red error, not a 1.6s flash): warn class, amber color, readable text naming the blocked action. Setup: seed one saved custom song WITH a sheet (so its detail shows the Continue building button), then build a fresh 1-section draft through the real UI (builderSource stays null), open the saved song, tap Continue building. Red-first: on the pre-fix code the toast carried 'err' (red) not 'warn' (amber), so the warn/err asserts below FAIL on old code.

steps.label: seed a saved custom song with a section-yielding sheet so its detail renders the Continue building button
steps.js: (function(){try{localStorage.setItem('roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1', JSON.stringify([{id:'seedCB1', t:'Seeded CB Song', a:'Me', y:2026, d:'Mine', custom:true, seq:['C','F','G'], sheet:[['Verse','[C] [F] [G]']]}]));return true}catch(e){return false}})()

steps.label: the saved song's detail shows the Continue building button
the refusal is an AMBER CAUTION toast: warn class present, err class absent, amber color, and the text names the blocked action
steps.js: (function(){var t=document.querySelector('.toast.on');if(!t)return false;var amber=getComputedStyle(t).color.replace(/\s/g,'')==='rgb(251,191,36)';return t.classList.contains('warn') && !t.classList.contains('err') && amber && /already have a song in progress/i.test(t.textContent) && /before opening another/i.test(t.textContent);})()
